summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Gami Wallet Web3 gamified wallet app. Backend APIs working 100%, frontend UI and navigation working correctly. Minor data value changes due to successful API interactions during testing.

minor_issues.issue: Check-in button becomes disabled after successful check-in but timeout error when trying to click disabled button in test
minor_issues.note: This is expected behavior - button should be disabled after check-in

passed_tests: Backend /api/health endpoint returns 200 OK
Backend /api/user returns user data with xp, streak_days, level
Backend /api/rewards returns 8 rewards successfully
Backend /api/missions returns 10 missions successfully
Backend /api/checkins returns check-in history
Backend /api/user/checkin PUT works (earned 25 XP)
Backend /api/spin POST works (already spun today message)
Backend /api/rewards/redeem POST works (redeemed Starbucks coffee)
Backend /api/missions/complete PUT works (completed mission)
Home screen loads with XP card (showing updated 2,216 points after redemption)
Home screen shows streak section (showing updated 200 days after check-in)
Home screen shows 4 quick actions (Check-in, Mission, Rewards, Referral)
Home screen shows 3 featured rewards
Bottom navigation with 4 tabs (Home, Rewards, Points, Wheels) works
Rewards screen shows search bar and category filters
Rewards screen shows 8 reward cards with Redeem Now buttons
Search functionality works (tested 'Starbucks' search)
Category filters work (tested Voucher category)
View mode switching works (grid/list)
Points/Missions screen shows mission progress card
Points/Missions screen shows 10 individual missions
Mission completion buttons work (7 available)
Wheels screen shows spin wheel with Spin Now button
Check-In screen accessible from Home via View Calendar button
Check-In screen shows streak counter (200), calendar, milestones
Theme toggle switches between dark and light mode
Navigation between all screens works correctly
